_comment: Facility configuration — the slow-changing frame the observations hang on (snapshot spec 5e). This is KNOWN CONFIGURATION, not sensed data: zone identity, stage and crop, and the sensors the houses are known NOT to have. Edit this when the greenhouse layout changes. Stage/crop are agronomic context, not biological inference. Zone ids match the existing convention (h1/h2/h3) so a Collector snapshot lines up with the rest of the system.
known_absent: co2 — no CO₂ sensor is reported by Synopta for these houses
light — no light/PPFD sensor is reported by Synopta for these houses
